entity.label: Almon-diblathaim
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: Two cakes, a city of Moab, on the east of the Dead Sea (Num. 33:46; Jer. 48:22).

nodes.label: Almon-diblathaim
nodes.description: Two cakes, a city of Moab, on the east of the Dead Sea (Num. 33:46; Jer. 48:22).

verses.text: And they removed from Dibongad, and encamped in Almondiblathaim.
And they removed from Almondiblathaim, and pitched in the mountains of Abarim, before Nebo.
